positive: A maximalist, geometric, and stylized tropical jungle scene, rendered in a vibrant, pop-art aesthetic. The composition should feature interconnected, highly contrasting natural elements: oversized monstera leaves, stylized hibiscus flowers, patterned parrots, and curling vines. The style should emulate retro illustration combined with modern flat vector graphics, utilizing bold outlines and limited, high-saturation colors (teal, magenta, canary yellow, emerald green). The animals and flora should be arranged in a repeating, kaleidoscopic pattern around a central axis, ensuring clean silhouettes and high readability when printed large on fabric. Studio lighting, high contrast, graphic design principles, vector art, symmetry, pop art style.
negative: low detail, blurry, watermark, signature, text, logo, writing, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, realistic photo, 3d render, clutter, monochrome
